title: Ghostty – Terminal Emulator
author: oli5679
aiHeadline: Finally, a terminal emulator that's so feature-packed it might just replace your cat as the most affectionate part of your setup.

title: Switch to Claude without starting over
author: doener
aiHeadline: Switching to Claude is now as easy as importing your memories—because who needs continuity when you can just copy-paste your soul?

title: I built a demo of what AI chat will look like when it's "free" and ad-supported
author: nickk81
aiHeadline: AI chat is now 'free'—because nothing says 'luxury' like being interrupted by ads for cat food every five seconds.

title: Decision trees – the unreasonable power of nested decision rules
author: mschnell
aiHeadline: Decision trees: because nothing says 'simplicity' like a flowchart that could double as a choose-your-own-adventure novel for hedge fund managers.

title: AI Made Writing Code Easier. It Made Being an Engineer Harder
author: saikatsg
aiHeadline: AI made writing code easier—but now you're just a glorified prompt engineer, because apparently, the future of tech is typing better error messages.
